memberdef.argsstring: (const std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > &mean, const std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > &variance, const std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > &momentum)
memberdef.name: set_previous_running_stats

briefdescription.para: Configuration attributes for batch normalization forward training.

detaileddescription.para: BatchnormAttributes configures a batch normalization operation for training. This operation normalizes the input tensor across the batch dimension and computes running statistics for inference.

listitem.para: X: Input tensor to normalize (NCHW format)
prev_running_mean: Previous running mean (for exponential moving average)
momentum: Momentum for running statistics update
